## Summary
A bicycle is a human-powered, pedal-driven vehicle with two wheels.

## Body
A bicycle is propelled by a rider turning pedals that drive the rear wheel through a
chain. This is **synthetic fixture content** for the Model & Retrieval Substrate contract.
It names no real person, place, or organisation. (It is deliberately off-topic from the
beverage pages so re-ranking has an unrelated candidate to push down.)
